content: BP demonstrates solid credibility on water and wastewater management, with quantified disclosure identifying water-stressed operating sites and a clean regulatory record across seven Environment Agency pollution records. The words-money stream suggests partial alignment between stated commitments and financial backing, with one verifiable consistent commitment alongside one that could not be verified. Talent signals are limited by a small sample size (n=7) with no senior-level representation, providing insufficient evidence to draw conclusions about internal capability depth in this area.
